name: Luara

skills.name: Serpent's Envoy
skills.description: Basic Attacks unleash serpent blades to deal damage, reducing Skill 1's cooldown for every enemy hit.

skills.name: Deadly Fang
skills.description: Activates a serpent blade and gains Movement Speed. She can quickly scale walls should she run into them during this period.

skills.name: Furtive Attack
skills.description: Summons the Fire Serpent at the target location, which then moves toward her, damaging and slowing enemies in its path. If serpent blades are active, it deals additional damage to enemies. If not, the cooldown is reduced.

skills.name: Blazing Glare
skills.description: Releases the Fire Serpent in the target direction, dealing damage and blinding enemies in its path, and gains a serpent blade. During this time, both attacking and being attacked will accumulate Fury. At full Fury, deals area damage and launches enemies.

tips: Luara (Marksman): Tier S on international ranked — 53% WR.
Build core: Boots of Dexterity, Vampiric Scythe, Shadow Ripper.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 53%, pick 1.6%, ban 0.2%, popularity tier S.

faqs.question: Is Luara good in current season?
faqs.answer: Luara is Tier S Marksman with 53% win rate, 1.6% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Luara build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Dexterity, Vampiric Scythe, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade, Blood Rage, Daybreaker's Virtue. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.
